# Lesto app

> Machine-readable index of this Lesto app's routes, islands, content collections, and CLI commands.

## Islands
- `analytics`
- `copy-code`
- `package-tabs`
- `search`

## Content collections
- `docs` (38 entries)

## CLI commands
- `lesto build`: Prerender the static sites to disk
- `lesto content:build`: Compile markdown content into the content store
- `lesto content:delete`: Delete a content entry from the store
- `lesto content:new`: Scaffold a new content entry
- `lesto deploy`: Build and ship the app (--cloudflare for the one-command edge deploy)
- `lesto dev`: Run every site live on one origin for local development
- `lesto generate` (alias `g`): Scaffold a resource (model | migration | island | page)
- `lesto help`: Show the usage help
- `lesto mcp`: Run the MCP control-plane server over stdio
- `lesto migrate`: Run pending migrations and print the applied versions
- `lesto openapi`: Emit the application's OpenAPI document
- `lesto rollback`: Flip the live pointer to a published release
- `lesto routes`: List the application's routes
- `lesto routes:gen`: Regenerate the edge route manifest (routes.gen.ts) from app/routes/
- `lesto serve`: Boot the app over HTTP
